creator: arrowd@FreeBSD.org
text:
While this PR was relevant during 14.0 release preparation, it doesn't make sense now. The releng team won't reroll .iso files if kde-baseapps didn't end up in the 14.0 release.

We surely would need to pay more attention to future releases, though, so please don't hesitate to open a similar PR in future if the problem reappears.
